title: vaccinium uliginosum subsp. vulcanorum
intro: Vaccinium uliginosum subsp. vulcanorum, also known as the dwarf bilberry or alpine bilberry, is a subspecies of the bilberry plant, native to high-altitude mountainous regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to have antibacterial and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Vaccinium uliginosum subsp. vulcanorum include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and boost the immune system, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cognitive function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
